item.title: Epstein files: Longevity guru Peter Attia quits CBS News after email fallout
item.description: Peter Attia is the latest person on a growing list to leave high-profile posts as a result of their communications with notorious sex offender Jeffrey...

item.title: Panama cancels China-linked port deal, hands canal terminals to Maersk, MSC
item.description: The simmering dispute has become a geopolitical flashpoint between Washington and Beijing, with Panama caught in the crossfire.

item.title: Democrats counter Trump's proposal to limit institutional housing investors
item.description: A new bill from Sen. Elizabeth Warren targets investors who own 50-plus single-family homes, and breaks with a White House proposal.

item.title: Epstein files: Ex-UK ambassador to U.S. Peter Mandelson released on bail after arrest
item.description: Mandelson's arrest came days after police arrested Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor, brother of King Charles III, on suspicion of misconduct in public offic...

item.title: FedEx sues for refund of Trump tariffs, days after Supreme Court ruling
item.description: The Trump administration has warned that it could take years for refunds to be paid out for tariffs that the Supreme Court ruled are illegal.
